description: Operator accrues vig (interest) on an outstanding loan. Vig is computed by the slow loop at its 4-hour cadence: vig = principal * vig_rate_bps / 10000 * hours_elapsed. Vig is tracked in LoanRecord.Outstanding as a running total owed beyond the principal. Vig is NOT burned on accrual — it remains as an obligation. When the borrower repays, repayment covers principal first; any Outstanding vig must also be repaid (via additional loan-repay messages or a combined settlement). If Outstanding > 0 at due_at, the difference contributes to the Defaulted inflationary record. Only the exchange operator may emit this message. State effect: LoanRecord.Outstanding += amount.

args.name: loan_id
args.description: Loan ID for which vig is accruing. Must reference an Active loan record.

args.name: amount
args.description: Vig amount accrued in this period, in micro-tokens. Computed as: principal * vig_rate_bps / 10000 * fractional_hours_elapsed.

validation: loan_id MUST reference a known, Active LoanRecord.
Antecedent MUST be the scrip:loan-mint message for loan_id or the most recent scrip:loan-vig-accrue for loan_id (chained accrual).
The slow loop MUST NOT emit vig-accrue for Repaid or Defaulted loans.
